calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Default Jduggemtn
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Anne E. Sweeney, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Steven Grand-Jean.
Plaintiff Witness Crystal Smolinski was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Bellecarmen Burnett.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,285.63
Prejudgment Interest - $790.26
Costs - $633.07, for a total judgment in the amount of $13,708.96

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
